name: Google Drive File Summarizer
description: List files from Google Drive, use Claude AI to summarize their content, and post a structured summary to Slack. Ideal for quickly digesting documents across a Drive folder.

source.originalName: Load and summarize Google Drive files with AI

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the file summaries

driveQuery.description: Google Drive search query to filter files (default: all non-folder files)

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to summarize

steps.name: Compile file metadata for AI analysis
